content: ISO 27001 is the international standard for information security management systems (ISMS).
Why would a small startup bother with full certification rather than just SOC 2?
Certification signals trust to enterprise customers and structures your controls.
I disagree that it's worth it for us. Compare 27001 and SOC 2 for a 10-person SaaS in our case.
Here is a comparison across cost, scope, and customer expectations...
